calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-16-2016 Off Calendar

MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-15-547684, CGC-15-548069, CGC-15-548204, CGC-16-549909, CGC-16-553418, CGC-16-553419, CGC-16-553420 WITH CASE CGC-16-553417
Off Calendar Nov-23-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Edward Schroeder of Selman Breitman telephone number 415-979-0400 for Defendant Emerald Steel.
James Hetherington of Law Offices of Goodman Neuman Hamilton LLP telephone number 415-705-0410 for Defendant Build Group Inc.
Daven Lowhurst of Jones Day telephone number 415-875-5783 appeared by telephone for Plaintiff/Defendant SF Hotels Investors.
Patricia Lakner of Davidovitz & Bennett LLP telephone number 415-956-4800 appeared by telephone for Defendant E&F Demolitian.
Seta Sarabekian of Matthews Law Group telephone number 858-952-0615 appaered by telephone for Plaintiff Old Republic General Insurance Corp.

The matter was discussed. Calrification was provided with respect to Court procedure regarding complex designation. Defendant Emerald Steel, Inc.'s motion to consolidate eight cases (CGC-15-547684, CGC-15-548069, CGC-15-548204, CGC-16-549909, CGC-16-553418, CGC-16-553419, CGC-16-553420 WITH CASE CGC-16-553417) for all purposes and for an order deeming the consolidated matters complex and assigning them to a complex department is GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE IN PART. The motions are not opposed by any party other than SF Hotel Investors and Renoir HM, LLC. The latter parties oppose consolidation for trial at this time because consolidation for trial is premature and a single trial of the property damage and personal injury claims could prejudice them. The actions involve common questions of law and fact and consolidation will likely enhance judicial efficiency and will reduce the risk of inconsistent judgments. (See Code Civ. Proc., 1048, subd. (a); Cal. Rules of Ct., rule 3.500.) The motion to consolidate for all purposes is granted without prejudice to SF Hotel Investors and Renoir HM, LLC requesting separate trials at trial setting. The request that the court deem the consolidated matters complex and assign them to a complex department is denied without prejudice to presentation of the same request to Department 304. (See L.R.S.F. 3.6(C)(2).) Mr. Schroeder is to prepare a form of order. The order must designate the lead case.

Judge: Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. (302/JQ)
